title: Section 6
content: 1[6. Term of office of Presiding Officer.-- The Presiding Officer of a Tribunal shall hold office for a term of five years from the date on which he enters upon his office and shall be eligible for reappointment: Provided that no person shall hold office as the Presiding Officer of a Tribunal after he has attained the age of sixty-five years.]
footnote: 1 Subs. by s. 28, ibid., for section 6 (w.e.f. 1-9-2016).
